title: Knicks Data Tracker
lede: Review the upcoming five-game schedule and Jalen Brunson's recent scoring behaviour.

sections.title: Upcoming Schedule
sections.description: Next five fixtures for the New York Knicks.

sections.title: Recent Scoring
sections.description: Jalen Brunson's points over the last five starts.

demoSteps: Load the local dashboard view in the browser.
Observe the calculated highlights for L5 and L3 averages.
Verify the threshold flag triggers accurately based on the 33.7 average.
Review the upcoming schedule table for correct dates and locations.
notes: All data is fed via static JSON fixtures to ensure zero network variance.
Maintains UK spelling (e.g., 'behaviour', 'colour') across any additional interface text.
Architecture is decoupled, allowing seamless API integration in V2 without structural changes.
